idempiere.Description: Taiwan Unified Invoice and Business Tax System

AD_EntityType.Name: Taiwan Invoice Tax System
AD_EntityType.Description: Taiwan Unified Invoice and Business Tax System

AD_Reference.Name: TW_InvoiceType
AD_Reference.Description: Taiwan Invoice Type: B2B Tripart or B2C Bipart

AD_Reference.Name: TW_AdjustmentDirection
AD_Reference.Description: Taiwan Adjustment Direction: Sales or Purchase

AD_Menu.Name: Taiwan Invoice System 台灣統一發票系統
Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌管理
AD_Window.Description: Manage Taiwan Ministry of Finance assigned invoice prefix ranges

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix 發票字軌
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan Ministry of Finance assigned invoice prefix ranges

AD_Menu.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應
AD_Menu.Description: View Taiwan invoice to prefix mapping

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應管理
AD_Window.Description: Maps iDempiere invoices to Taiwan invoice prefix and number

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Prefix Map 發票對應
AD_Table.Description: Maps iDempiere invoices to Taiwan invoice prefix and number

AD_Menu.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓

AD_Window.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓管理
AD_Window.Description: Taiwan sales and purchase invoice adjustments

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Invoice Adjustment 進項折讓
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan sales and purchase invoice adjustments (returns and allowances)

AD_Table.Name: Taiwan Tax Statement 401申報表
AD_Table.Description: Taiwan Form 401 Business Tax Return (bimonthly VAT filing)
